## IWorkspaceFactoryParams interface

Parameters for creating a workspace with platform-specific defaults. Used by platform factory functions.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IWorkspaceFactoryParams extends Omit<IWorkspaceCreateParams, 'keyStore'> 
```
